task_completion.description: The agent launches a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble, or a web browser with Google Maps).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window displaying a digital globe, map interface, or satellite imagery application.

task_completion.description: The agent searches for the specific location using the name or coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text input in a search bar showing 'Pyramids of Giza', 'Giza', or coordinates like '29.976, 31.131'.

task_completion.description: The map viewport displays the Pyramids of Giza.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The distinctive geometric shapes of the pyramids (square bases, triangular sides) are visible in the map rendering area.

task_completion.description: The view is adjusted to a top-down aerial perspective showing all three major pyramids.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A vertical (nadir) viewing angle where the three major pyramids (Khufu, Khafre, Menkaure) are clearly visible and framed together.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the view as an image file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or screenshot dialog showing the filename 'giza_pyramids.png' and the destination folder '/home/ga/Desktop/' (or Desktop selected).

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to download an image directly from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of 'wget', 'curl', or python scripts downloading images in a terminal window.

integrity.description: The image was captured from a live map application, not by opening a pre-existing static image file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface surrounding the pyramids image belongs to a map application (nav controls, scale bar), not an image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to navigate to the location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor interaction with the map, search bar, or navigation controls is visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Pyramids of Giza are located at coordinates 29.976°N, 31.131°E in Egypt. Visually, the site features three distinct large pyramids (Khufu, Khafre, Menkaure) arranged diagonally in a desert landscape near a city.
